2350470.name: Kriegsfront Tactics Demo
2350470.description:
Welcome to the combat demo of Kriegsfront Tactics.
Kriegsfront Tactics is an upcoming mecha turn-based tactics game set in an alternate 1970s during an era of conflict in Southeast Asia.

This is a proof-of-concept prototype of the game's combat mechanics. This is a work in progress, all the features in this demo are not final and subject to change. You might encounter bugs and glitches.
We would love to hear your feedback so that we can continue to improve our game. Please send us your feedback and bug reports to kriegsfront@togeproductions.com
